theorem:  mergesort_sorted
sample:   0
attempt:  fix_7

[proof]
revert l
refine Nat.strong_induction_on ?_ ?_
intro n IH l hl
· exact l.length
· by_cases h : l.length < 2
  · unfold mergesort
    simp [h]
    cases l with
    | nil =>
      exact Sorted.nil
    | cons x xs =>
      cases xs with
      | nil =>
        exact Sorted.singleton
      | cons y ys =>
        exfalso
        simp at h
  · unfold mergesort
    simp [h]
    apply merge_sorted
    · apply IH (left l).length
      · simpa [hl] using left_less l
      · rfl
    · apply IH (right l).length
      · simpa [hl] using right_less l
      · rfl

[lean error]
location:
      refine Nat.strong_induction_on ?_ ?_
      intro n IH l hl
           ^
      · exact l.length
error: Tactic `introN` failed: There are no additional binders or `let` bindings in the goal to introduce
case refine_1
T : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Preorder T
inst✝ : DecidableRel LT.lt
⊢ ℕ
